code:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Upstream
    participant agent-client-relationships
    participant Database
    participant agent-assurance
    participant des

    Upstream->>+agent-client-relationships: POST /api/:arn/invitation
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Read: Check for pending invitations.
    agent-client-relationships->>+agent-assurance: GET /agent-assurance/agent-details/:arn
    agent-assurance-->>-agent-client-relationships: Response
    agent-client-relationships->>+des: GET /registration/business-details/... or /vat/customer/vrn/...
    des-->>-agent-client-relationships: Response
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Read: Check for active relationship.
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Read: Check for partial-auth relationship (ITSA).
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Create: Create new invitation.
    agent-client-relationships-->>-Upstream: Final Response

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个邀请流程的时序图，核心模块是agent-client-relationships服务。上游系统调用它来创建邀请，它需要查数据库、调agent-assurance获取代理详情，还要调des拿客户工商或VAT信息。
明白。入口是Upstream发POST到/api/:arn/invitation对吧？然后agent-client-relationships先去Database检查有没有待处理的邀请，这个查库是同步调用吗？
对的，同步的。接着它要并发调agent-assurance的GET /agent-assurance/agent-details/:arn拿代理信息，等返回后再调des。des有两个可能的端点：/registration/business-details或者/vat/customer/vrn，取决于客户类型。

好的，我把participant按顺序排好：Upstream、agent-client-relationships、Database、agent-assurance、des。第一步画Upstream发POST到agent-client-relationships，带+号表示激活。然后agent-client-relationships去Database读数据检查pending invitations。
等等，agent-assurance和des的调用是激活新生命线的那种，返回后生命线就销毁。另外数据库后面还有几次查询：查active relationship、查partial-auth relationship（ITSA场景），最后才是Create new invitation。
收到，agent-assurance和des用+和-配对。我补全了：agent-assurance返回Response，des返回Response，然后两次Database读操作，分别是active relationship和ITSA的partial-auth，最后Create new invitation。
ITSA那里标一下括号备注，还有最后要画回给Upstream的Final Response，这个别漏了。
已修正，ITSA加了括号备注，最后agent-client-relationships返回Final Response给Upstream。整个流程从POST开始到Final Response结束，中间两次外部服务调用加四次数据库操作，都齐了。
